questions.question: How many standard units of time are in an 8-hour period?
questions.explanation: An 8-hour period is equal to 4 standard units of time.

questions.question: What is the typical duration of a shift in many industries?
questions.explanation: Many industries have a standard 8-hour shift.

questions.question: How many hours are in an 8-hour period in minutes?
questions.explanation: There are 60 minutes in an hour, so there are 8 x 60 = 480 minutes in an 8-hour period.

questions.question: What is the standard number of hours worked by a full-time employee in some countries?
questions.explanation: In some countries, a standard full-time workday is 8 hours.

questions.question: How many days are there in a standard 8-hour workday?
questions.explanation: A standard 8-hour workday is a single day.
